name: What if Perplexity denies scraping my site and says it's fair indexing?
description: Subpoena logs; scraping proven via bots/outputs.[1]

mainEntity.name: What if Perplexity denies scraping my site and says it's fair indexing?

acceptedAnswer.text: Subpoena logs; scraping proven via bots/outputs.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Demand preservation letter; subpoena logs to prove scraping vs. indexing—NYT distinguishes unlawful copying.[1][7] Key factors: crawler evidence, output verbatimity.[1] Indexing may fair use, but training/output infringement separate.[7] Escalate to litigation for discovery. Truth emerges in court.
